The Future of Renewable Energy

Renewable energy sources such as solar and wind are transforming the global energy landscape. Investment in clean energy reached a record $500 billion in 2025.

Solar panel efficiency has improved dramatically, with new perovskite cells achieving over 30% efficiency in laboratory conditions. This compares favorably to traditional silicon cells.

Wind energy capacity doubled in the last five years, driven by offshore installations in the North Sea and along the US Atlantic coast.
